title: fraxinus rotundifolia subsp. syriaca
intro: Fraxinus rotundifolia subsp. syriaca, also known as Syrian ash or Fraxinus syriaca, is a subspecies of the Fraxinus rotundifolia tree, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fraxinus rotundifolia subsp. syriaca include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
